GPL is short for General Public Licence. [[OpenLieroX]] uses a special type of this licence: the Lesser General Public Licence (LGPL). Actually, we never differed so much if we use GPL or LGPL and it also doesn't make such a big difference because there aren't really any other projects which depend on OpenLieroX.

* [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/GNU_General_Public_License GPL on Wikipedia]
* <http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/lesser.html>

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20120903170039/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/GPL -->
